web_results.title: Fed Leaves Rates Unchanged to Start 2026: Is a Cut Coming in March? | J.P. Morgan
web_results.description: The Federal Reserve (Fed) held its benchmark interest rate in a range of 3.5% to 3.75% at the January meeting, pausing its recent rate-cutting trend.
